description: Kubernetes infrastructure metrics for Clario 360 — pod health, resource utilization, PVC storage, node resources, HPA scaling, and certificate status.

panels.description: Total number of pods in the namespace
panels.title: Total Pods

panels.description: Number of pods in Ready condition
panels.title: Ready Pods

panels.description: Total container restarts in the last 24 hours
panels.title: Total Restarts (24h)

panels.description: Total CPU usage across all containers in the namespace
panels.title: Total CPU Usage

panels.description: Total memory usage across all containers in the namespace
panels.title: Total Memory Usage

panels.description: CPU usage per pod over time
panels.title: Pod CPU Usage

panels.description: Memory usage per pod over time
panels.title: Pod Memory Usage

panels.description: CPU usage as a percentage of configured limits per pod

targets.expr: 100 * sum by (pod) (rate(container_cpu_usage_seconds_total{namespace="$namespace", image!=""}[$__rate_interval])) / sum by (pod) (kube_pod_container_resource_limits{namespace="$namespace", resource="cpu"})

panels.title: CPU Utilization vs Limits

panels.description: Memory usage as a percentage of configured limits per pod

targets.expr: 100 * sum by (pod) (container_memory_working_set_bytes{namespace="$namespace", image!=""}) / sum by (pod) (kube_pod_container_resource_limits{namespace="$namespace", resource="memory"})

panels.title: Memory Utilization vs Limits

panels.description: Detailed pod status including resource usage and health

targets.expr: 100 * sum by (pod) (rate(container_cpu_usage_seconds_total{namespace="$namespace", image!=""}[5m])) / sum by (pod) (kube_pod_container_resource_requests{namespace="$namespace", resource="cpu"})
100 * sum by (pod) (container_memory_working_set_bytes{namespace="$namespace", image!=""}) / sum by (pod) (kube_pod_container_resource_requests{namespace="$namespace", resource="memory"})

panels.title: Pod Status Overview

panels.description: PVC used bytes vs total capacity per persistent volume claim
panels.title: PVC Used vs Capacity

panels.description: Percentage of PVC capacity used per persistent volume claim
panels.title: PVC Utilization %

panels.description: HPA current replicas over time showing scaling events
panels.title: HPA Scaling Events

panels.description: TLS certificate expiration status from cert-manager
panels.title: Certificate Status

panels.description: Container restart count over time per pod
panels.title: Restart Trend

title: Clario 360 — Infrastructure
